case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CURTIS BURTON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-30-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BURTON, CURTIS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-13-2014

DEC OF NON SERV OF: SUMNS; COMPLT; CAUSE OF ACTION; STMT OF LOC/VNU; CIVL CASE COVR SHT; DEC 395B; ADR INFO PKG; ADR PKT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BURTON, CURTIS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-30-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
